title: cachrys dichotoma
intro: Cachrys dichotoma, also known as Wild Fennel or Ferula, is a perennial herb plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to the Middle East and Mediterranean regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cachrys dichotoma include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cachrys dichotoma can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
